index.hero_title: Bringing Hope to Those Who Need It Most
index.hero_desc: Since 2011, we have worked tirelessly in missions and social aid to transform the reality of our community and beyond.
index.welcome_text_1: We are an organization dedicated to selfless service, driven by love and faith. Our mission is to provide material, spiritual and emotional support to the most vulnerable families, bringing a message of hope and transformation.
index.welcome_text_2: In Isidro Casanova and various regions, we have built bridges of solidarity that allow aid to reach directly those who truly need it.
index.impact_card_1_text: Of experience in missions and social work.

about.hero_desc: Committed to service and social transformation.
about.history_text_1: Since 2011, Misioneros Unidos was born from a deep desire to serve the most needy in Isidro Casanova and its surroundings. What began as a local initiative, driven by faith and love for others, has grown into a Civil Association dedicated to direct social action.
about.history_text_2: Over the years, we have faced challenges, but the satisfaction of seeing lives transformed has been our driving force. We have specialized in missions that bring not only material aid, but also spiritual and emotional support, recognizing that true transformation begins in the heart.
about.history_text_3: Today, Misioneros Unidos is a benchmark of solidarity in our community, coordinating efforts between volunteers and donors to reach the most forgotten corners.
about.mission_text: To provide comprehensive assistance to people in situations of vulnerability, promoting human dignity through social missions, food support and spiritual accompaniment.
about.vision_text: To be a leading organization in social action and missions, recognized for its transparency, efficiency and ability to generate a positive and sustainable impact on society.
about.founder_text_1: Jonatan Pereda is the visionary behind Misioneros Unidos. With an unwavering vocation for service, Jonatan founded the project in 2011 with the conviction that no one should feel alone in their struggle against poverty and hopelessness.
about.founder_text_2: Through his leadership, he has guided hundreds of volunteers in local and international missions, always maintaining the focus on humility, love and transparency. His commitment to the community of Isidro Casanova has been the cornerstone upon which all the Association's work has been built.

contact.hero_desc: We are here to listen to you, whether you want to help or need support.
contact.form_option_volunteer: I want to be a Volunteer

donations.hero_desc: Every donation, no matter the size, becomes food, clothing and hope for those who need it most.
donations.card_food_text: Purchase of non-perishable foods and assembly of food bags for families in street situations and vulnerability.
donations.card_clothing_text: Acquisition of clothing, footwear and blankets, especially during the winter months to protect the most homeless.
donations.card_health_text: Support in the purchase of basic medications and facilitation of medical appointments for people without health coverage.
donations.card_missions_text: Logistics and transport of volunteers and materials to critical areas to bring direct aid and spiritual support.
donations.example_1_text: Can provide a basic food bag for a family for one week.
donations.example_2_text: Allows equipping a child with winter clothing and appropriate footwear.
donations.example_3_text: Contributes significantly to the funding of a complete social mission in a vulnerable area.
donations.how_subtitle: Choose the option that suits you best
donations.method_bank_owner: Owner: Asociacion Civil Centro de Misioneros Unidos de Isidro Casanova
donations.method_paypal_text: You can make your donation quickly and securely through our official PayPal account.
donations.method_paypal_owner: Owner: Asociacion Civil Centro de Misioneros Unidos de Isidro Casanova
donations.method_species_text: We receive clothing, non-perishable foods and hygiene items.
donations.method_species_location: Location: Av. Juan Manuel de Rosas 7840, Isidro Casanova
donations.transparency_text_1: At Misioneros Unidos we believe that trust is the basis of solidarity. Therefore, we commit to use every cent donated exclusively for the social and missionary purposes of the association.
donations.transparency_text_2: We maintain detailed records of all inputs and outputs, and we are open to providing accountability to our donors and collaborators.

media.hero_desc: Capturing moments of hope and solidarity.
media.videos_subtitle: Testimonies and chronicles of our missions
